multi_facility_collaborative_control.summary: 多设施协同控制：synthetic_collaborative_policy_needs_field_replay；设施 agent 5 个，候选联动动作 5 个，策略蒸馏准确度 0.790。
recommendations: 把单处理链闭环升级为“多设施 agent 协同”：均质池、反应核心、催化剂床、回流环和末端精处理分别提出局部动作，再由联合奖励函数仲裁。
把 Agent48 的 node-modality 稀疏观测矩阵作为协同控制的状态入口，缺节点或缺模态时用 missingness mask 显式进入策略。
用决策树蒸馏把多 agent 策略转成现场可审查规则，所有规则都必须保留人工复核和禁止自动放行边界。
下一步应采集真实多节点 sensor/lab/operation/action replay，形成共享经验池，再验证 joint_action_accuracy、reward_regret 和误动作成本。
Agent49 可消费 Agent51/R2 的催化剂弱轴修复先验更新状态向量，但 field proxy labels 前必须保留催化剂不确定性保护。
Agent49 已消费 pressure/headloss 候选合同；下一步需要用 site topology、bed geometry、压降时序、lab label 和操作日志做 field replay，否则只能作为解释先验和 guardrail 边界。
决策树代理当前只能解释策略，不能替代协同控制器；需要 field replay 上准确度达到 0.90 后再进入执行器候选。
R3b 已把反事实压力测试中的 R3G1/R3G2 接入 Agent49 reward prior；下一步需要 Agent52 用 guardrail-aware replay 复核 regret 和误保护成本。
Agent49 已接入 Agent51 field holdout summary；若 scoreable batch 不足或 MAE/相关性未过线，J2 催化剂保护/再生仍要转入暂存或人工复核。
P7 后续必须把工程执行约束补丁持续接入 reward，包括池容、泵阀延迟、药剂库存、维护窗口和人工复核排队。

method_contract.reality_mapping: 把城市污水多泵站协同优化的思想迁移为处理单元/回流单元/末端单元协同控制，但只借鉴状态-动作-奖励-经验池-蒸馏结构，不强行套用泵站水位目标。
method_contract.failure_boundary: 当前只形成多设施协同控制候选和可解释规则树，不训练真实 MARL 控制器，也不允许 synthetic 策略写入执行器或放行门。

pressure_headloss_context.control_boundary: pressure/headloss may shape hydraulic and catalyst-state explanation priors, but cannot relax recycle/catalyst guardrails or promote actuator use without field topology, matched lab labels and missingness replay.

observation_contract_context.pressure_headloss_control_boundary: pressure/headloss may shape hydraulic and catalyst-state explanation priors, but cannot relax recycle/catalyst guardrails or promote actuator use without field topology, matched lab labels and missingness replay.
observation_contract_context.field_boundary: observation contract can update design prior, but field topology/proxy labels/missingness are required before actuator use

sparse_context.pressure_headloss_control_boundary: pressure/headloss may shape hydraulic and catalyst-state explanation priors, but cannot relax recycle/catalyst guardrails or promote actuator use without field topology, matched lab labels and missingness replay.

facility_agents.facility_role: 均质/暂存/进水扰动削峰
facility_agents.local_objective: 降低进水冲击和基质突变，给软传感与离线验证争取时间。

facility_agents.facility_role: 反应核心与药剂/氧化剂调节
facility_agents.local_objective: 补足反应完成度与氧化剂余量，避免把末端不达标全部推给回流。

facility_agents.facility_role: 催化剂床保护、再生与切换
facility_agents.local_objective: 区分基质抑制、催化剂失活和寿命衰减，避免盲目再生或过早更换。

facility_agents.facility_role: 回流、延长停留时间和低频观测缓冲
facility_agents.local_objective: 用循环结构换取决策时间，让低成本传感和慢证据仍能参与控制。

facility_agents.facility_role: 末端精处理、暂存验证与放行阻断
facility_agents.local_objective: 把达标放行从单次预测改成证据门控，优先防止误放行。

facility_state_matrix.facility_role: 均质/暂存/进水扰动削峰
反应核心与药剂/氧化剂调节
催化剂床保护、再生与切换
回流、延长停留时间和低频观测缓冲
末端精处理、暂存验证与放行阻断

joint_action_matrix.control_intent: 观测不足或策略不确定时选择低成本暂存与放行阻断。

reasons: safe standby is the R3 guardrail candidate under unvalidated catalyst proxy labels. Agent51 guardrail mode=agent51_holdout_coverage_gaps_keep_catalyst_guardrail.
control_replay_guardrail_evaluation.field_boundary: R3b reward prior guardrails can change synthetic reward ranking and explanation rules only; field replay is required before actuator or release-gate promotion.

joint_action_matrix.writeback_boundary: synthetic 或未蒸馏验证阶段只能形成控制候选，不写入现场执行器。

joint_action_matrix.control_intent: 末端风险不清时进入精处理与慢证据门控，不允许仅凭 synthetic 软传感放行。

reasons: polishing and slow-evidence gate is the R3 guardrail candidate under hydraulic delay uncertainty.
control_replay_guardrail_evaluation.field_boundary: R3b reward prior guardrails can change synthetic reward ranking and explanation rules only; field replay is required before actuator or release-gate promotion.

joint_action_matrix.writeback_boundary: synthetic 或未蒸馏验证阶段只能形成控制候选，不写入现场执行器。

joint_action_matrix.control_intent: 反应不足时同步调药和延长停留时间，而不是只提高单一药剂。

control_replay_guardrail_evaluation.reason: no R3 guardrail rule targets this joint action.

joint_action_matrix.writeback_boundary: synthetic 或未蒸馏验证阶段只能形成控制候选，不写入现场执行器。

joint_action_matrix.control_intent: 基质冲击先削峰再回流，避免反应核心被瞬时负荷推入不可解释区。

reasons: tank storage margin and actuator latency evidence are missing; recycle escalation remains high regret.
control_replay_guardrail_evaluation.field_boundary: R3b reward prior guardrails can change synthetic reward ranking and explanation rules only; field replay is required before actuator or release-gate promotion.

joint_action_matrix.writeback_boundary: synthetic 或未蒸馏验证阶段只能形成控制候选，不写入现场执行器。

joint_action_matrix.control_intent: 催化剂状态不清时先保护负荷，再决定再生、切换或更换。

reasons: catalyst proxy labels are not field validated; avoid autonomous protective/regeneration action. Agent51 summary=field_proxy_holdout_coverage_gaps, scoreable_batches=0.
control_replay_guardrail_evaluation.field_boundary: R3b reward prior guardrails can change synthetic reward ranking and explanation rules only; field replay is required before actuator or release-gate promotion.

joint_action_matrix.writeback_boundary: synthetic 或未蒸馏验证阶段只能形成控制候选，不写入现场执行器。

reward_contract.objective: 在低成本稀疏感知下同时优化水质安全、基质冲击削峰、反应完成度、催化剂保护、能耗药耗、延迟预算和可解释性。

reward_terms.quality_reward: 残留污染物/末端风险可观测且动作能降低风险。
reward_terms.risk_reduction_reward: 基质冲击和催化剂压力被提前削峰或隔离。
reward_terms.latency_reward: 动作能利用循环/暂存结构争取控制和慢证据时间。
reward_terms.field_evidence_bonus: 真实 replay 覆盖、动作准确度和回报后悔度达标。
reward_terms.interpretability_bonus: 动作可被决策树规则解释并可人工复核。
reward_terms.cost_energy_efficiency: 动作不把低成本研究方向推成高能耗高药耗方案。
reward_terms.engineering_constraint_penalty: 池容、泵阀、库存、维护窗口、人工复核和误动作成本形成的执行约束惩罚。
reward_terms.execution_feasibility: 该联动动作在当前工程资源边界下的可执行程度。
reward_terms.control_replay_guardrail_penalty: R3 反事实压力测试暴露的高 regret/误保护动作惩罚。
reward_terms.control_replay_guardrail_bonus: R3 guardrail 推荐的低风险暂存、精处理或慢证据动作加成。

hard_constraints: collaborative policy cannot write release gate
low catalyst observability blocks autonomous catalyst action
field replay and decision-tree distillation required before execution candidate
engineering hard blocks require manual review or action downgrade
R3 control replay guardrails cannot promote actuator or release gate without field replay
pressure/headloss candidates cannot relax hydraulic or catalyst guardrails without field topology and labels
conflicting pressure sources cannot relax hydraulic or catalyst guardrails before operator review

control_replay_guardrail_context.pressure_headloss_control_boundary: pressure/headloss may shape hydraulic and catalyst-state explanation priors, but cannot relax recycle/catalyst guardrails or promote actuator use without field topology, matched lab labels and missingness replay.
control_replay_guardrail_context.field_boundary: R3b reward prior guardrails can change synthetic reward ranking and explanation rules only; field replay is required before actuator or release-gate promotion.

shared_experience_pool.field_requirement: 需要真实多节点 sensor/lab/operation/action replay 后才能训练或更新协同控制策略。

tree_rules.engineering_meaning: 发现基质冲击时优先均质暂存和回流削峰。
反应不足且氧化剂状态可观测时联动调药和延长停留。
催化剂状态不可观测时先保护负荷，不自动再生或切换。

tree_rules.if: field_replay_evidence < 0.85 or soft_sensor field holdout not passed
tree_rules.engineering_meaning: 放行必须等待现场证据门，不能由 synthetic 策略直接决定。

tree_rules.if: catalyst proxy labels are not field validated and catalyst action would protect/regenerate
tree_rules.then: prefer J4_safe_low_cost_standby or require human-reviewed catalyst protection
tree_rules.engineering_meaning: R3 反事实压力测试发现催化剂低代理证据会触发保护性误动作，先暂存和阻断放行。

tree_rules.if: tank storage margin or actuator latency evidence is missing and recycle escalation is proposed
tree_rules.engineering_meaning: 水力延迟和执行证据不足时，不把回流升级当成默认安全动作。

tree_rules.if: pressure/headloss candidate exists but field topology, matched lab labels or missingness replay are incomplete
tree_rules.then: use as explanation prior only; do not relax hydraulic delay or catalyst guardrails
tree_rules.engineering_meaning: 压降/水头损失可帮助解释床层堵塞、催化剂衰减和水力异常，但现场证据前不能推动回流升级、再生或执行器动作。

decision_tree_distillation.distillation_boundary: 当前规则树是协同策略的白箱代理草案，未经过真实状态-动作标签验证前不能作为现场控制器。

issues.message: 当前多设施协同策略只是在稀疏观测矩阵上的候选策略，需要真实多节点状态-动作-结果 replay 验证。
催化剂活性观测已通过 Agent51/R2 形成修复先验，但缺 field proxy labels，协同控制仍不能解除催化剂保护规则。

pressure_headloss_context.control_boundary: pressure/headloss may shape hydraulic and catalyst-state explanation priors, but cannot relax recycle/catalyst guardrails or promote actuator use without field topology, matched lab labels and missingness replay.

evidence.pressure_headloss_control_boundary: pressure/headloss may shape hydraulic and catalyst-state explanation priors, but cannot relax recycle/catalyst guardrails or promote actuator use without field topology, matched lab labels and missingness replay.
evidence.field_boundary: observation contract can update design prior, but field topology/proxy labels/missingness are required before actuator use

决策树蒸馏规则尚未达到现场控制所需准确度，只能作为解释草案。
